revision.content: This page is only here for historical purposes. This never took off so we stopped offering lockers for rent. This can be revisited in the future if there is a demand. We have a limited number of lockers now available for rent. Each unit is 12 inches wide (opening is 9" wide), 11.5 inches tall, and 17 inches deep. Each one can be locked by your own lock. While no one here is going to mess with your stuff, we do recommend using a secure lock if you wish to guarantee that no one opens your locker. The rental rate for members is $10 a month in addition to monthly dues. For non-members, the rate is $20 per month. Please let us know if you are interested, you can see us in person at a weekly meeting or send mail to contact at bloominglabs dot org. Thanks!
